title: Monetdb Query parsing consistency issues in the latest release (Remote Table)
description:
The check method for the identifier used in the GROUPBY clause is inconsistent between the Remote Table and the Local Table.


**To Reproduce**
poc: select * from keyword_test order by name;
select '*' as category, count(*) as cnt from keyword_test group by category;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent GROUPBY clause identifier check between tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_groupby (id INT NOT NULL, name STRING NULL, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_groupby GROUP BY name;
